name: Crock Pot Italian Beef
recipeIngredient: 4 lb. pot roast of beef, (4 to 5)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pot roast in the crock pot.
2. Add water, salt, pepper, oregano, onion salt, garlic salt, and basil to the crock pot with the beef.
3. Pour over the Good Season salad dressing.
4. Cook on low for all day.
5. Shred the beef using tongs or a fork.
6. Return the shredded beef to the broth for an additional 15 minutes.
7. Serve the beef on buns or over French bread.
